# compare.score_painter { #tspaint.compare.score_painter }

```python
tspaint.compare.score_painter(
    painter,
    ts,
    labels,
    queries,
    truth_states,
    **kwargs,
)
```

Run a painter on ``ts`` and score it against the truth.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**painter**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[callable](`callable`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   A painter ``f(ts, labels, queries, **kwargs) -> {sample: [Segment]}``.

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Tree sequence to paint.

<code>[**labels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Reference sample id -> ancestry-state index.

<code>[**queries**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Sample ids to paint and score.

<code>[**truth_states**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[tuple](`tuple`)\[[float](`float`), [float](`float`), [int](`int`)\]\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   True ancestry-state tracts per sample (e.g. from :func:`tspaint.validate.map_truth`).

<code>[****kwargs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [{}]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Forwarded to ``painter``.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Keys ``"balanced_accuracy"``, ``"accuracy"`` and ``"confidence"`` from the :mod:`tspaint.validate` metrics, scored over ``queries``.
